sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-09-04 17:20
- Distance: 9.1 km
- Moving time: 50:09
- Elapsed time: 51:54
- Elevation gain: 144.2 m
- Average heart rate: 165.2 bpm
- Max heart rate: 184 bpm
- Average watts: 233.5 W
- Average speed: 10.9 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `166.3 bpm`, ranging from `151.3` to `172.9 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `159.0 bpm` and second-half average HR was `171.2 bpm` (+12.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `166.9 spm`, with a working range of `110.0` to `174.7 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `163.0 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `169.5 spm` (+6.5 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:30 /km` across `9.109 km` in `50:09` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:19 /km` and second-half pace was `5:42 /km` (+22 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `165.2 bpm` average and `184 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `158.3 bpm` in the first half and `171.1 bpm` in the second (+12.8 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `50:09` out of `51:54` elapsed (96.6%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `9` stop segments and `1.1%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `159.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.4 m` and `71.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `50.0 m` in the first half and `109.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
